title: TGaceAllStories
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Microsoft’s stock selloff is approaching a critical crossroads unseen in over 10 years
items.description: Shares of Microsoft are less than 3% above their 200-week moving average, which has provided key technical support in the past.

items.title: Stop muzzling the 1%: The wealthy have a right to free speech — and democracy needs billionaires
items.description: Bashing the rich won’t fix inequality — it simply gives power to elites who already control the agenda.

items.title: 9 of the stock market’s 10 most-watched valuation indicators are now in ‘sell’ territory
items.description: Indicators are at extremes — stretched valuations are bearish for stocks.

items.title: Why more CEOs are chatting directly with customers
items.description: Executives say it’s all about learning how to better run their businesses, but some corporate watchers question if this is just a PR move.

items.title: Bitcoin mining is no longer profitable after crypto's latest downward turn, analyst says
items.description: Bitcoin briefly sank below $63,000 on Tuesday, dragging down its miners alongside it.

items.title: Loop Capital upgrades this semiconductor stock as key headwinds ease and its strategy diversifies
items.description: Loop Capital sees shares of Qualcomm surging 32% from here.

items.title: Watch these chart formations for clues into what's next for market volatility
items.description: Despite talk of the great rotation out of growth and technology and into value and defensive areas, the Nasdaq 100 is only 4.5% off its all-time high.

items.title: BlackRock’s Rick Rieder is locking in attractive yields in this corner of the bond market before the opportunity slips away
items.description: BlackRock's Rick Rieder tells CNBC where he is investing for income right now and why he thinks the opportunity may not last.

items.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.
